✦ The Real Deal
🌱 Jesse & Lisa — your Vero Beach mushroom growers

🍄 About Sporeship

A family farm
powered by fungi
& a lot of love.

We're Jesse and Lisa — the growers behind Sporeship, a small local mushroom farm right here in Vero Beach. What started as a passion for healthy food and mycology grew into a mission to bring fresh, nutrient-dense mushrooms to our community.

Our little one often comes along for the ride. Locally grown. Family powered. Mushroom obsessed. 🍄❤️

📍 Vero Beach, FL 👨‍👩‍👧 Family run 🌿 No pesticides ⚡ Pre-order weekly 🧠 Nutrient-dense

```
⭐ Best Seller

🦁 Fresh Cut

Fresh Lion's Mane — 1 lb

Sautéed in butter it tastes surprisingly similar to crab or lobster. Pan fry with butter, garlic, and a pinch of sea salt. Simple. Healthy. Incredible.

$18 per pound
🔥 Bulk Deal

🌾 Fresh Cut

Fresh Oyster Mushrooms — 1 lb

Delicate, nutty, and incredibly versatile. Perfect for stir-fries, pasta, tacos, and soups. Try Jesse's simple oyster mushroom tacos — olive oil, garlic, chili powder & lime.

$14 per pound
🌱 Grow Kit

🌱 Grow Your Own

Mushroom Grow Bag Kit

Sterile grow bags and spore syringes — everything you need to grow your own gourmet mushrooms at home. Full growing guide included. Beginner friendly.

$28 per kit
```

From spore to your table. 🍄

Jesse & Lisa grow every bag by hand — no shortcuts, no cold storage, just love.

🧪

We Prepare

Every bag is carefully prepared with our own cultures and nutrient-rich substrate — mixed, sealed, and monitored for the healthiest grow possible.

🌙

We Tend

Bags colonize in our controlled grow tent — temperature, humidity, and airflow all dialed in. Part science, part art, a lot of love.

🍄

We Harvest

Once mushrooms hit peak freshness, Jesse & Lisa hand-harvest and pack immediately. Same day, every time. No cutting corners.

❤️

You Enjoy

Pre-orders ship every Friday in Vero Beach. Fresh, nutrient-dense mushrooms straight from our family farm to your kitchen.

❤️ Family Farm Life

"Locally grown.
Family powered.
Mushroom obsessed."

Growing mushrooms is part science, part art, and a lot of love. Every bag is carefully prepared and monitored by Jesse & Lisa — with their little one often along for the ride. Farm life at its best. 🍄

```
🌱 Welcome Post
Welcome to Sporeship! 🍄
We're Jesse and Lisa — the growers behind Sporeship in Vero Beach. What started as a love for mushrooms turned into a small family farm, with our 1-year-old supervising everything.

Our mission: grow healthy gourmet mushrooms, share ways to cook & enjoy them, and help others grow their own. Follow along for fresh harvests, recipes, and mushroom growing tips!

🍄 Mushroom Spotlight
Lion's Mane Spotlight 🍄
Lion's Mane isn't just delicious — it's amazing sautéed in butter and tastes surprisingly similar to crab or lobster!

Quick idea:
Pan fry with butter, garlic, and a pinch of sea salt.

Simple. Healthy. Incredible. Would you try Lion's Mane?

🍳 Recipe
Simple Oyster Mushroom Tacos 🌮
Try this easy recipe tonight!

Ingredients: Oyster mushrooms · Olive oil · Garlic · Chili powder · Lime · Tortillas

Cook mushrooms in a hot pan with oil and garlic until crispy. Add chili powder and lime. Serve in tortillas with avocado and cilantro.

Absolutely delicious. 🤤
```
